hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.css) npx --no-install prettier --write "$f" || true ;; esac

if [ "$(jq -r '.stop_hook_active // false')" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; if npm run test:run --silent >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; else echo 'Engine test suite is failing. Run: npm run test:run' >&2; exit 2; fi
